headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -57.9)
key_insights: Fears trending up 14% over 7 days (moderate momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 167 quotes and 117 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and annoyance today.

• The frustration score of 42.5 sits in the upper portion of the typical range, though down from yesterday's even higher peak.

• Both fears and optimism remain notably suppressed, with fears dropping significantly from yesterday while optimism stays near recent lows.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
